title: hypericum spathulatum
intro: Hypericum spathulatum, also known as Bearberry St. John's Wort, is a perennial herb native to the Pacific coast of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and depression, as well as exhibiting antiviral and antifungal activities. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
